nodes.name: Git Push Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives Webhook trigger on Git Push event.

nodes.name: Parse YAML & Filter Audience (Default Deny)
nodes.notes: Reads all YAML files, applies File-level default and Entry-level override. Applies Default Deny if tag missing/invalid.

nodes.name: Split into 3 Role Bundles
nodes.notes: Outputs 3 separate dataset items for Operation, NOC, and Customer.

nodes.name: Sync to Dify Datasets
nodes.notes: Pushes transformed role datasets to Dify APIs (kb-operation, kb-noc, kb-customer).
